{#- Right TOC. Each page type picks a "mode" via the template context. Each mode renders a different
with data-toc-mode set so JS can dispatch the same way. -#} {%- set right_toc_mode = 'default' -%} {%- if pagename == master_doc -%} {%- set right_toc_mode = 'none' -%} {%- elif collection is defined and collection -%} {%- set right_toc_mode = 'blog-browse' -%} {%- elif pagename == 'glossary' -%} {%- set right_toc_mode = 'glossary' -%} {%- elif not toc -%} {%- set right_toc_mode = 'none' -%} {%- endif -%} {% if right_toc_mode == 'default' %}
On this page
{{ toc }}
{# ========================================================================= #} {# Blog TOC #} {# ========================================================================= #} {% elif right_toc_mode == 'blog-browse' %}
{%- set blog_years = [] -%} {%- for post in collection -%} {%- if post.published and post.date.year not in blog_years -%} {%- set _ = blog_years.append(post.date.year) -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {% if blog_years %}

Years

    {% for year in blog_years %}
  • {{ year }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if ablog.tags %}

Tags

    {% for tag in ablog.tags %} {% if tag|string != 'featured' %}
  • {{ tag }} {{ tag|length }}
    • {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{# ========================================================================= #} {# Glossary TOC #} {# ========================================================================= #} {% elif right_toc_mode == 'glossary' %}
Terms
{# glossary_terms is set by docs/_ext/glossary_toc.py #}
    {% for term in glossary_terms %}
  • {{ term.text }}
    • {% endfor %}
{# right_toc_mode == 'none' → no
rendered #} {% endif %}
